description: Optional local harness registry. Copy to harnesses.json (gitignored) or set AGENT_BENCH_HARNESSES_FILE. Built-in adapters win when names collide; unknown names are loaded from this file as thin shell commands.

grok.default_command: if [ "$AGENT_BENCH_MODEL" = "unspecified" ]; then grok --always-approve --output-format json --prompt-file {instruction_file}; else grok --always-approve --output-format json -m "$AGENT_BENCH_MODEL" --prompt-file {instruction_file}; fi
grok.notes: Headless multi-turn with tools. Pin the grok CLI version in reports when comparing.

gemini.default_command: if [ "$AGENT_BENCH_MODEL" = "unspecified" ]; then gemini -y -p "$(cat {instruction_file})"; else gemini -y -m "$AGENT_BENCH_MODEL" -p "$(cat {instruction_file})"; fi
gemini.notes: Example only; adjust flags after checking your installed gemini CLI.

opencode.notes: Built-in adapter preferred. Registry entry documents the template for forks.

claude-code.default_command: if [ "$AGENT_BENCH_MODEL" = "unspecified" ]; then claude -p --output-format json --dangerously-skip-permissions --no-session-persistence "$(cat {instruction_file})"; else claude -p --output-format json --dangerously-skip-permissions --no-session-persistence --model "$AGENT_BENCH_MODEL" "$(cat {instruction_file})"; fi
